# Rentals Kamloops

> Self-managed rental property company in Kamloops, BC. Offering apartments, houses, and townhomes for rent across Kamloops neighbourhoods.

Rentals Kamloops provides quality rental properties throughout Kamloops, BC. We are self-managed and focused on responsive, transparent property management. Tenants can browse listings, apply online, and submit maintenance requests through the website.

## Services
- Rental listings: Apartments, houses, townhomes across Kamloops
- Online rental applications
- Maintenance request portal for current tenants
- Property management: Responsive, self-managed

## Neighbourhoods Served
Downtown, Aberdeen, Sahali, Valleyview, North Shore, Westsyde, and surrounding Kamloops areas.

## Contact
- Phone: (250) 828-0000
- Email: info@rentalskamloops.ca
- Website: https://rentalskamloops.ca
- Location: Kamloops, BC
